dae.label: Label
dae.Title: Effects
dae.noeffect: Your character does not have an effect name
dae.notTargetItem: This item does not have targets specified
dae.ConsumeCharge.Name: Consume Charge On Passive Activation
dae.ConsumeCharge.Hint: When activating a passive effect via togglePassiveEffect or chat status card only activate if the item has charges and consume a charge
dae.playersCanSeeEffects.Name: Allow players to see details of effects
dae.playersCanSeeEffects.Hint: If off do not show players the item effects tab or detailed effects summary for passive items. TRUSTED Players can edit effects
dae.tokenEffects.Name: Enable Token Effects
dae.tokenEffects.Hint: Allows effects that target a specific token, e.g. invisible, blind (experimental feature)
dae.calculateArmor.Name: Auto Calculate armor class
dae.calculateArmor.Hint: If true dynamic effects will auto calculate AC from armor/shields in the inventory. Other items can still modify AC
dae.applyBaseAC.Name: Auto calc base AC
dae.applyBaseAC.Hint: If set characters (not NPCs) will get their base AC set to 10 + dex.mod
dae.transfer.Name: Apply Effect to Actor
dae.transfer.Hint: Enabled means the effect is applied to the owner of the item when the item is equipped. Disable if you want the effect to apply to a target when the item is used
dae.useAbilitySave.Name: Use ability save field when rolling ability saves
dae.useAbilitySave.Hint: DND5e default uses only the ability modifier, enabling this option means rolling saves will use the save field and can be modified via DAE
dae.Debug.Name: Amount of debug to show
dae.Debug.Hint: Display more debug to console according to setting none < warning < debug < all
dae.expireRealTime.Name: Expire timed effects in real time
dae.expireRealTime.Hint: If enabled and about-time/times-up are not installed timed effects will expire in real time.
dae.isAttacked: Is Attacked: Expires if the character is attacked
dae.isMoved: Moved: expires when the token is moved
dae.isDamaged: is Damaged: Expires if the character is damaged
dae.isHealed: is Healed: expires if the character is healed
dae.ZeroHP: Zero HP: expires if the character reaches 0 HP
dae.isHit: is Hit: Expires if the character is hit by any weapon/spell attack even if the weapon/spell does not deal damage
dae.isHitCritical: is Hit Critical: Expires if the character is hit by a critical weapon/spell attack
dae.1Action: 1 Action: Expires on the next action (item roll) of the character
dae.Bonus Action: Expires on the next items use has an activation type Bonus Action
dae.Reaction: Expires on the next items use which has an activation type Reaction
dae.Turn Action: Expires on the next items use which is of activation type Action
dae.1Attack: 1 Attack: Expires on the next {type} by the character
dae.1Spell: 1 Spell: Expires on the next spell cast (ANY spell) by the character
dae.1Reaction: 1 Reaction: Expires after the attack that triggered the reaction is complete
dae.1Hit: 1 Hit: Expires on the next {type} hit by the character
dae.1Critical: 1 Critical: Expires on the next critical hit by the character
dae.1Fumble: 1 Fumble: Expires on the next fumble by the character
dae.DamageDealt: Damage dealt: Expires when the character deals damage
dae.turnStart: Turn Start: Expires at the start of the target's next turn (in combat)
dae.turnStartSource: Turn Start: Expires at the start of the source actor's next turn (in combat)
dae.turnEnd: Turn End: Expires at the end of the target's next turn (in combat)
dae.turnEndSource: Turn End: Expires at the end of the source actor's next turn (in combat)
dae.startEveryTurn: Start of each turn: Run effect macros at the start of the characters turn
dae.startEndEveryTurn: Start and End of each turn: Run effect macros at the start of the characters turn
dae.startEveryTurnAny: Start of each turn: Run effect macros at the start of the characters turn even if the effect is disabled
dae.startEndEveryTurnAny: Start and end of each turn: Run effect macros at the start and end of the characters turn even if the effect is disabled
dae.endEveryTurn: End of each turn: Run effect macros at the end of the characters turn
dae.endEveryTurnAny: End of each turn: Run effect macros at the end of the characters turn even if the effect is disabled
dae.noDupDamageMacro.Name: No Duplicate Damage macros
dae.noDupDamageMacro.Hint: If checked duplicate Damage Macros will be ignored
dae.DisableEffects.Name: Disable all active effect processing
dae.DisableEffects.Hint: If set no active effects will be applied to characters. Useful if you want to change character values that are modified by active effects
dae.HandleEquip.Name: Handle Equip/Unequip item active effects
dae.HandleEquip.Hint: If set DAE will handle equip/unequip enabling/disabling active effects and toggling active will toggle equip/unequip
dae.DAETitleBar.Name: DAE Title Bar
dae.DAETitleBar.Hint: Display DAE effect editor button in Title Bar
dae.DIMETitleBar.Name: DIME Title Bar
dae.DIMETitleBar.Hint: Display DAE Item Macro Editor in Title Bar
dae.DAEColorTitleBar.Name: DAE Colorful Title Bar
dae.DAEColorTitleBar.Hint: Apply a color to the DAE effect editor button/DIME button, if any effects/item macros are present in the document (Needs DAE Title Bar checked).
dae.DAENoTitleText.Name: Just Icon
dae.DAENoTitleText.Hint: Only display the wrench icon in the Title Bar otherwise icon + DAE
dae.ShowDeprecation.Name: Show Deprecation Errors
dae.maxShortDuration.Name: Max Short Duration
dae.maxShortDuration.Hint: Maximum duration in rounds for short duration effects
dae.ShowInline.Name: Display results of inline rolls
dae.ShowInline.Hint: Effects with an inline roll will display the roll results if set

dae.StackableOptions.noneName: Effects do not stack by effect name and effect origin
dae.StackableOptions.noneNameOnly: Effects do not stack by effect name
dae.StackableOptions.none: Effects do not stack by effect origin
dae.StackableOptions.multi: Stacking effects apply the effect multiple times
dae.StackableOptions.count: each stack increase stack count by 1
dae.StackableOptions.countDeleteDecrement: apply increase stacks by 1, delete decrease stacks by 1, removed on 0 stacks

dae.SW5EHint: Note For Translators - The following strings are ONLY required for the SW5E system
dae.forceToHud.Name: Force display on token
dae.forceToHud.Hint: If non empty set the icon for the effect will be displayed on the token regardless of duration
dae.DurationExpression: Roll expression in seconds for the effect duration
dae.not-reflected: Item Effect Saved. These changes will not be reflected in the originally transferred Effect.
dae.not-transferred: Item Effect Saved. Setting an owned item's effect to Transfer will not automatically transfer the Effect.
dae.ATLHint: Note for translators these are only required for Active Token Lighting
dae.DAEUntestedSystems.Name: Load DAE for untested game systems
dae.DAEUntestedSystems.Hint: If checked DAE will load for any system not marked compatible. If unchecked DAE will only load for systems marked compatible. Requires reload
dae.SelfTarget.Name: Apply to self when item applies target effects
dae.SelfTarget.Hint: Effect is applied to the user of the item, not the targets if the item is applying effects to targets
dae.SelfTargetAlways.Name: Apply to self when item is rolled
dae.SelfTargetAlways.Hint: Effect is applied to the user of the item, not the targets whenever the item is rolled
dae.ShowIcon.Name: Always Show Effect Icon
dae.ShowIcon.Hint: Display the effect Icon on the token and combat display
dae.DontApply.Name: Don't apply the effect
dae.DontApply.Hint: When Dae (and midi) applies active effects, skip this one
dae.DIMEditor.Name: DIME
dae.DIMESyncItemacro.Name: Sync DIME and Itemacro
dae.DIMESyncItemacro.Hint: Checked means the DIME macro and Itemacro macro will be kept in sync - you can edit with either. Uncheck DIME editor will take priority.
dae.DAEAddHalfHealthEffect.Name: Add Half Health Effect
dae.DAEAddHalfHealthEffect.Hint: Add a half health status effect to set the actor's max hit points to half its normal max
dae.DisableCondition: An expression which if true will disable the effect
dae.EnableCondition: An expression which if false will remove the effect from the actor
dae.IconOverlay.Name: Icon Overlay
dae.IconOverlay.Hint: Display the effect status icon as an overlay
dae.DependentConditions.Name: Dependent Conditions
dae.DependentConditions.Hint: Status effects (poisoned/paralysed) will also add dependent conditions like incapacitated.
__Comment__: The following strings are for the DAE system. Translation is optional

macro.createItem.name: Create Item
macro.createItem.description: Create an item on the Actor, value should be the item's uuid.

macro.createItemRunMacro.name: Create Item & Run Macro
macro.createItemRunMacro.description: Create an item on the Actor and run the item's DIME with "onCreate", value should be the item's uuid.

macro.execute.name: Macro to Execute
macro.execute.description: Which macro to execute on application/removal, referenced by name. Can also provide additional arguments to be used by the macro. The execution will be socketed to the GM if the target actor isn't owned.

macro.execute.GM.name: Macro for GM to Execute
macro.execute.GM.description: Same as "macro.execute", except macro execution is forced to the GM.

macro.execute.local.name: Macro to Execute Locally
macro.execute.local.description: Same as "macro.execute", except macro execution is forced to be local.

macro.itemMacro.name: Execute ItemMacro/DIME
macro.itemMacro.description: On effect application/removal, run ItemMacro/DIME stored on the parent item. Can also provide additional arguments to be used by the macro. The execution will be socketed to the GM if the target actor isn't owned.

macro.itemMacro.GM.name: Execute ItemMacro/DIME as GM
macro.itemMacro.GM.description: Same as "macro.itemMacro", except macro execution is forced to the GM.

macro.itemMacro.local.name: Execute ItemMacro/DIME Locally
macro.itemMacro.local.description: Same as "macro.itemMacro", except macro execution is forced to be local.

macro.StatusEffect.name: Apply Status Effect
macro.StatusEffect.description: Effectively identical to simply selecting a status on the details page, but creates the status programmatically, and doesn't force visibility of a passive effect.

check.roll.max.name: {ability} Check Max
check.roll.max.description: NOTE: Nonfunctional prior to 5.1.0. The maximum rollable on a d20 for a {ability} check.

check.roll.min.name: {ability} Check Min
check.roll.min.description: NOTE: Nonfunctional prior to 5.1.0. The minimum rollable on a d20 for a {ability} check.

check.roll.mode.name: {ability} Check Roll Mode
check.roll.mode.description: NOTE: Nonfunctional prior to 5.1.0. Roll mode for {ability} checks. "Add" adds a source of advantage (1) or disadvantage (-1). Override forces advantage (1), disadvantage (-1), or straight roll (0).

save.roll.max.name: {ability} Save Max
save.roll.max.description: NOTE: Nonfunctional prior to 5.1.0. The maximum rollable on a d20 for a {ability} save.

save.roll.min.name: {ability} Save Min
save.roll.min.description: NOTE: Nonfunctional prior to 5.1.0. The minimum rollable on a d20 for a {ability} save.

save.roll.mode.name: {ability} Save Roll Mode
save.roll.mode.description: NOTE: Nonfunctional prior to 5.1.0. Roll mode for {ability} saves. "Add" adds a source of advantage (1) or disadvantage (-1). Override forces advantage (1), disadvantage (-1), or straight roll (0).

ability.name: {skill} Ability
ability.description: Which ability to use for {skill} checks.

roll.max.name: {skill} Max
roll.max.description: The maximum rollable on a d20 for {skill} checks.

roll.min.name: {skill} Min
roll.min.description: The minimum rollable on a d20 for {skill} checks.

roll.mode.name: {skill} Roll Mode
roll.mode.description: Roll mode for {skill} checks. "Add" adds a source of advantage (1) or disadvantage (-1). Override forces advantage (1), disadvantage (-1), or straight roll (0).

system.attributes.ac.AR.name: (Midi) Armor Reduction
system.attributes.ac.AR.description: See "Challenge Mode" details in midi-qol readme.

system.attributes.ac.armor.name: AC (Armor)
system.attributes.ac.armor.description: Bonus to AC provided by worn armor (usually provided only via equipped armor item - will only have an effect if not wearing armor).

system.attributes.ac.cover.name: AC (Cover)
system.attributes.ac.cover.description: AC cover bonus (usually provided only via cover status effects).

system.attributes.ac.EC.name: (Midi) Evasion Class
system.attributes.ac.EC.description: See "Challenge Mode" details in midi-qol readme.

system.attributes.ac.flat.name: AC (Flat)
system.attributes.ac.flat.description: Requires system.attributes.ac.calc to be Flat (AC = this) or Natural Armor (AC = this + any shield bonus).

system.attributes.ac.formula.name: AC Formula
system.attributes.ac.formula.description: Requires system.attributes.ac.calc to be Custom Formula.

system.attributes.ac.min.name: Minimum AC
system.attributes.ac.min.description: If calculated lower, will upgrade to this number.

system.attributes.ac.shield.name: AC (Shield)
system.attributes.ac.shield.description: AC shield bonus (usually provided only via equipped shield item).

system.attributes.ac.value.name: AC (Total)
system.attributes.ac.value.description: Don't use this: Use system.attributes.ac.calc as Flat or Natural Armor and system.attributes.ac.flat as your desired value instead in order to override AC value, or use system.attributes.ac.bonus in order to add a bonus.

system.attributes.concentration.ability.name: Concentration Ability
system.attributes.concentration.ability.description: Which ability to use for Concentration saves.

system.attributes.concentration.limit.name: Concentration Limit
system.attributes.concentration.limit.description: Maximum number of spells that can be concentrated on.

system.attributes.concentration.roll.max.name: Concentration Max
system.attributes.concentration.roll.max.description: The maximum rollable on a d20 for Concentration saves.

system.attributes.concentration.roll.min.name: Concentration Min
system.attributes.concentration.roll.min.description: The maximum rollable on a d20 for Concentration saves.

system.attributes.concentration.roll.mod.name: Concentration Roll Mode
system.attributes.concentration.roll.mod.description: Roll mode for Concentration saves. "Add" adds a source of advantage (1) or disadvantage (-1). Override forces advantage (1), disadvantage (-1), or straight roll (0).

system.attributes.death.failure.name: Death Save Failures
system.attributes.death.failure.description: Number of death save failures. Not particularly useful to modify via an active effect.

system.attributes.death.roll.max.name: Death Save Max
system.attributes.death.roll.max.description: The maximum rollable on a d20 for Death saves.

system.attributes.death.roll.min.name: Death Save Max
system.attributes.death.roll.min.description: The minimum rollable on a d20 for Death saves.

system.attributes.death.roll.mode.name: Death Save Roll Mode
system.attributes.death.roll.mode.description: Roll mode for Death saves. "Add" adds a source of advantage (1) or disadvantage (-1). Override forces advantage (1), disadvantage (-1), or straight roll (0).

system.attributes.death.success.name: Death Save Successes
system.attributes.death.success.description: Number of death save successes. Not particularly useful to modify via an active effect.

system.attributes.encumbrance.bonuses.ov.name: Overall Encumbrance Bonus
system.attributes.encumbrance.bonuses.ov.description: Bonus to each encumbrance threshold, and maximum encumbrance.

system.attributes.encumbrance.multiplier.name: Overall Encumbrance Multiplier
system.attributes.encumbrance.multiplier.description: Multiplier to each encumbrance threshold, and maximum encumbrance.

system.attributes.hp.bonuses.level.name: HP Bonus Per Level
system.attributes.hp.bonuses.level.description: Bonus to HP applied for each character level (only works for classed actors).

system.attributes.hp.bonuses.overall.name: HP Overall Bonus
system.attributes.hp.bonuses.overall.description: Bonus to HP (only works for classed actors).

system.attributes.hp.max.name: Max HP
system.attributes.hp.max.description: This should not be modified on an actor with a class - use one of the .bonuses or .tempmax instead.

system.attributes.hp.temp.name: Temp HP
system.attributes.hp.temp.description: This should never be modified in an active effect - use a "Heal" activity instead.

system.attributes.hp.value.name: Current HP
system.attributes.hp.value.description: This should never be modified in an active effect - apply damage via an activity instead.

system.attributes.init.ability.name: Initiative Ability
system.attributes.init.ability.description: Which ability to use for Initiative rolls.

system.attributes.init.roll.max.name: Initiative Max
system.attributes.init.roll.max.description: The maximum rollable on a d20 for an Initiative roll.

system.attributes.init.roll.min.name: Initiative Min
system.attributes.init.roll.min.description: The minimum rollable on a d20 for an Initiative roll.

system.attributes.init.roll.mode.name: Initiative Roll Mode
system.attributes.init.roll.mode.description: Roll mode for Initiative rolls. "Add" adds a source of advantage (1) or disadvantage (-1). Override forces advantage (1), disadvantage (-1), or straight roll (0).

system.attributes.movement.all.name: (DAE) Movement Speed (All)
system.attributes.movement.all.description: A flat number will result in all movement types being set to that number. Otherwise, "+5" or "*2" for instance would add 5 to or multiply by 2 all existing movement types (ignoring types which the actor has no movement in), respectively.

system.bonuses.All-Damage.name: (DAE) Attack Damage Bonus
system.bonuses.All-Damage.description: Bonus to all Attack-activity damage rolls.

system.bonuses.check.damage.name: (DAE) Check Damage Bonus
system.bonuses.check.damage.description: Bonus to all Check-activity damage rolls.

system.bonuses.heal.damage.name: (DAE) Heal Damage Bonus
system.bonuses.heal.damage.description: Bonus to all Heal-activity damage rolls.

system.bonuses.msak.attack.name: Melee Spell Attack Bonus
system.bonuses.msak.attack.description: Bonus to all "melee spell attack" attack rolls.

system.bonuses.msak.damage.name: Melee Spell Attack Damage Bonus
system.bonuses.msak.damage.description: Bonus to all "melee spell attack" damage rolls.

system.bonuses.mwak.attack.name: Melee Weapon Attack Bonus
system.bonuses.mwak.attack.description: Bonus to all "melee weapon attack" attack rolls.

system.bonuses.mwak.damage.name: Melee Weapon Attack Damage Bonus
system.bonuses.mwak.damage.description: Bonus to all "melee weapon attack" damage rolls.

system.bonuses.rsak.attack.name: Ranged Spell Attack Bonus
system.bonuses.rsak.attack.description: Bonus to all "ranged spell attack" attack rolls.

system.bonuses.rsak.damage.name: Ranged Spell Attack Damage Bonus
system.bonuses.rsak.damage.description: Bonus to all "ranged spell attack" damage rolls.

system.bonuses.rwak.attack.name: Ranged Weapon Attack Bonus
system.bonuses.rwak.attack.description: Bonus to all "ranged weapon attack" attack rolls.

system.bonuses.rwak.damage.name: Ranged Weapon Attack Damage Bonus
system.bonuses.rwak.damage.description: Bonus to all "ranged weapon attack" damage rolls.

system.bonuses.save.damage.name: (DAE) Save Damage Bonus
system.bonuses.save.damage.description: Bonus to all Save-activity damage rolls.

system.bonuses.spell.all.damage.name: (DAE) Spell Damage Bonus
system.bonuses.spell.all.damage.description: Bonus to all spell damage rolls.

system.bonuses.spell.attack.name: (DAE) Spell Attack Bonus
system.bonuses.spell.attack.description: Bonus to all spell attack rolls.

system.bonuses.spell.damage.name: (DAE) Spell Attack Damage Bonus
system.bonuses.spell.damage.description: Bonus to all Attack-activity spell damage rolls.

system.bonuses.weapon.attack.name: (DAE) Weapon Attack Bonus
system.bonuses.weapon.attack.description: Bonus to all weapon attack rolls.

system.bonuses.weapon.damage.name: (DAE) Weapon Attack Damage Bonus
system.bonuses.weapon.damage.description: Bonus to all Attack-activity weapon damage rolls.

system.traits.armorProf.all.name: (DAE) All Armor Proficiency
system.traits.armorProf.all.description: Having this key at all grants armor proficiency with all armors.

system.traits.armorProf.value.name: Individual Armor Proficiency
system.traits.armorProf.value.description: Use mode Add and choose armor proficiency to add. -proficiency removes it.

system.traits.ci.all.name: (DAE) All Condition Immunity
system.traits.ci.all.description: Having this key at all grants immunity to all conditions.

system.traits.ci.value.name: Individual Condition Immunity
system.traits.ci.value.description: Use mode Add and choose condition immunity to add. -condition removes it.

system.traits.da.all.name: (Midi) All Damage Absorption
system.traits.da.all.description: Acts as a multiplier to all damage received. For instance, a value of -1 would result in all damage healing for the amount instead of damaging by it.

da.name: (Midi) Damage Absorption ({damage})
da.description: Damage Absorption for {damage} damage. Acts as a multiplier to all damage received. For instance, a value of -1 would result in all damage healing for the amount instead of damaging by it.

system.traits.da.bypasses.name: (Midi) Damage Absorption Bypasses
system.traits.da.bypasses.description: Item/weapon properties which bypass Damage Absorption.

system.traits.da.midi.all.name: (Midi) Damage Absorption (All)
system.traits.da.midi.all.description: Damage Absorption for all damage types. Acts as a multiplier to all damage received. For instance, a value of -1 would result in all damage healing for the amount instead of damaging by it.

system.traits.da.midi.heal.name: (Midi) Damage Absorption (Heal Activities)
system.traits.da.midi.heal.description: Damage Absorption for Heal activities. Acts as a multiplier to all damage received. For instance, a value of -1 would result in all damage healing for the amount instead of damaging by it.

system.traits.da.midi.magical.name: (Midi) Damage Absorption (Magical)
system.traits.da.midi.magical.description: Damage Absorption for Magical damage. Acts as a multiplier to all damage received. For instance, a value of -1 would result in all damage healing for the amount instead of damaging by it.

system.traits.da.midi.msak.name: (Midi) Damage Absorption (msak)
system.traits.da.midi.msak.description: Damage Absorption for melee spell attacks. Acts as a multiplier to all damage received. For instance, a value of -1 would result in all damage healing for the amount instead of damaging by it.

system.traits.da.midi.mwak.name: (Midi) Damage Absorption (mwak)
system.traits.da.midi.mwak.description: Damage Absorption for melee weapon attacks. Acts as a multiplier to all damage received. For instance, a value of -1 would result in all damage healing for the amount instead of damaging by it.

system.traits.da.midi.non-adamant-physic.name: (Midi) Damage Absorption (Non-Adamant Physical)
system.traits.da.midi.non-adamant-physic.description: Damage Absorption for Non-Adamant Physical damage. Acts as a multiplier to all damage received. For instance, a value of -1 would result in all damage healing for the amount instead of damaging by it.

system.traits.da.midi.non-magical.name: (Midi) Damage Absorption (Non-Magical)
system.traits.da.midi.non-magical.description: Damage Absorption for Non-Magical damage. Acts as a multiplier to all damage received. For instance, a value of -1 would result in all damage healing for the amount instead of damaging by it.

system.traits.da.midi.non-magical-physic.name: (Midi) Damage Absorption (Non-Magical Physical)
system.traits.da.midi.non-magical-physic.description: Damage Absorption for Non-Magical Physical damage. Acts as a multiplier to all damage received. For instance, a value of -1 would result in all damage healing for the amount instead of damaging by it.

system.traits.da.midi.non-physical.name: (Midi) Damage Absorption (Non-Physical)
system.traits.da.midi.non-physical.description: Damage Absorption for Non-Physical damage. Acts as a multiplier to all damage received. For instance, a value of -1 would result in all damage healing for the amount instead of damaging by it.

system.traits.da.midi.non-silver-physica.name: (Midi) Damage Absorption (Non-Silver Physical)
system.traits.da.midi.non-silver-physica.description: Damage Absorption for Non-Silver Physical damage. Acts as a multiplier to all damage received. For instance, a value of -1 would result in all damage healing for the amount instead of damaging by it.

system.traits.da.midi.non-spell.name: (Midi) Damage Absorption (Non-Spell)
system.traits.da.midi.non-spell.description: Damage Absorption for Non-Spell damage. Acts as a multiplier to all damage received. For instance, a value of -1 would result in all damage healing for the amount instead of damaging by it.

system.traits.da.midi.physical.name: (Midi) Damage Absorption (Physical)
system.traits.da.midi.physical.description: Damage Absorption for Physical damage. Acts as a multiplier to all damage received. For instance, a value of -1 would result in all damage healing for the amount instead of damaging by it.

system.traits.da.midi.rsak.name: (Midi) Damage Absorption (rsak)
system.traits.da.midi.rsak.description: Damage Absorption for ranged spell attacks. Acts as a multiplier to all damage received. For instance, a value of -1 would result in all damage healing for the amount instead of damaging by it.

system.traits.da.midi.rwak.name: (Midi) Damage Absorption (rwak)
system.traits.da.midi.rwak.description: Damage Absorption for ranged weapon attacks. Acts as a multiplier to all damage received. For instance, a value of -1 would result in all damage healing for the amount instead of damaging by it.

system.traits.da.midi.save.name: (Midi) Damage Absorption (Save Activities)
system.traits.da.midi.save.description: Damage Absorption for Save activities. Acts as a multiplier to all damage received. For instance, a value of -1 would result in all damage healing for the amount instead of damaging by it.

system.traits.di.all.name: (DAE) All Damage Immunity
system.traits.di.all.description: Having this key at all grants immunity to all damage types.

system.traits.di.bypasses.name: Damage Immunity Bypasses
system.traits.di.bypasses.description: Item/weapon properties which bypass damage immunity.

system.traits.di.value.name: Individual Damage Immunity
system.traits.di.value.description: Use mode Add and choose type damage immunity to add. -type removes it.

dm.amount.name: Damage Modification ({damage})
dm.amount.description: Damage Modification for {damage} damage. Positive numbers mean additional damage taken, negative mean reduced damage taken.

system.traits.dm.bypasses.name: Damage Modification Bypasses
system.traits.dm.bypasses.description: Item/weapon properties which bypass damage modification.

system.traits.dm.midi.all.name: (Midi) Damage Modification (All)
system.traits.dm.midi.all.description: Damage Modification for all damage types. Positive numbers mean additional damage taken, negative mean reduced damage taken.

system.traits.dm.midi.heal.name: (Midi) Damage Modification (Heal Activities)
system.traits.dm.midi.heal.description: Damage Modification for Heal activities. Positive numbers mean additional damage taken, negative mean reduced damage taken.

system.traits.dm.midi.magical.name: (Midi) Damage Modification (Magical)
system.traits.dm.midi.magical.description: Damage Modification for Magical damage. Positive numbers mean additional damage taken, negative mean reduced damage taken.

system.traits.dm.midi.msak.name: (Midi) Damage Modification (msak)
system.traits.dm.midi.msak.description: Damage Modification for melee spell attacks. Positive numbers mean additional damage taken, negative mean reduced damage taken.

system.traits.dm.midi.mwak.name: (Midi) Damage Modification (mwak)
system.traits.dm.midi.mwak.description: Damage Modification for melee weapon attacks. Positive numbers mean additional damage taken, negative mean reduced damage taken.

system.traits.dm.midi.non-adamant-physic.name: (Midi) Damage Modification (Non-Adamant Physical)
system.traits.dm.midi.non-adamant-physic.description: Damage Modification for Non-Adamant Physical damage. Positive numbers mean additional damage taken, negative mean reduced damage taken.

system.traits.dm.midi.non-magical.name: (Midi) Damage Modification (Non-Magical)
system.traits.dm.midi.non-magical.description: Damage Modification for Non-Magical damage. Positive numbers mean additional damage taken, negative mean reduced damage taken.

system.traits.dm.midi.non-magical-physic.name: (Midi) Damage Modification (Non-Magical Physical)
system.traits.dm.midi.non-magical-physic.description: Damage Modification for Non-Magical Physical damage. Positive numbers mean additional damage taken, negative mean reduced damage taken.

system.traits.dm.midi.non-physical.name: (Midi) Damage Modification (Non-Physical)
system.traits.dm.midi.non-physical.description: Damage Modification for Non-Physical damage. Positive numbers mean additional damage taken, negative mean reduced damage taken.

system.traits.dm.midi.non-silver-physica.name: (Midi) Damage Modification (Non-Silver Physical)
system.traits.dm.midi.non-silver-physica.description: Damage Modification for Non-Silver Physical damage. Positive numbers mean additional damage taken, negative mean reduced damage taken.

system.traits.dm.midi.non-spell.name: (Midi) Damage Modification (Non-Spell)
system.traits.dm.midi.non-spell.description: Damage Modification for Non-Spell damage. Positive numbers mean additional damage taken, negative mean reduced damage taken.

system.traits.dm.midi.physical.name: (Midi) Damage Modification (Physical)
system.traits.dm.midi.physical.description: Damage Modification for Physical damage. Positive numbers mean additional damage taken, negative mean reduced damage taken.

system.traits.dm.midi.rsak.name: (Midi) Damage Modification (rsak)
system.traits.dm.midi.rsak.description: Damage Modification for ranged spell attacks. Positive numbers mean additional damage taken, negative mean reduced damage taken.

system.traits.dm.midi.rwak.name: (Midi) Damage Modification (rwak)
system.traits.dm.midi.rwak.description: Damage Modification for ranged weapon attacks. Positive numbers mean additional damage taken, negative mean reduced damage taken.

system.traits.dm.midi.save.name: (Midi) Damage Modification (Save Activities)
system.traits.dm.midi.save.description: Damage Modification for Save activities. Positive numbers mean additional damage taken, negative mean reduced damage taken

system.traits.dr.all.name: (DAE) All Damage Resistance
system.traits.dr.all.description: Having this key at all grants resistance to all damage types.

system.traits.dr.bypasses.name: Damage Resistance Bypasses
system.traits.dr.bypasses.description: Item/weapon properties which bypass damage reduction.

system.traits.dr.value.name: Individual Damage Resistance
system.traits.dr.value.description: Use mode Add and choose damage type reduction to add. -type removes it.

system.traits.dv.all.name: (DAE) All Damage Vulnerability
system.traits.dv.all.description: Having this key at all grants vulnerability to all damage types.

system.traits.dv.bypasses.name: Damage Vulnerability Bypasses
system.traits.dv.bypasses.description: Item/weapon properties which bypass damage vulnerability.

system.traits.dv.value.name: Individual Damage Vulnerability
system.traits.dv.value.description: Use mode Add and choose damage type vulnerability to add. -type removes it.

system.traits.languages.all.name: (DAE) All Languages
system.traits.languages.all.description: Having this key at all grants all languages.

system.traits.languages.value.name: Individual Languages
system.traits.languages.value.description: Use mode Add and choose language to add.

system.traits.weaponProf.all.name: (DAE) All Weapon Proficiency
system.traits.weaponProf.all.description: Having this key at all grants weapon proficiency with all armors.

system.traits.weaponProf.value.name: Individual Weapon Proficiency
system.traits.weaponProf.value.description: Use mode Add and choose weapon proficiency to add. -proficiency removes it.

system.attributes.hd.spent.name: Hit Dice Spent
system.attributes.hd.spent.description: Not particularly useful to modify via an active effect.

system.currency.cp.name: CP
system.currency.cp.description: Do not use this, it will update every time the actor does.

system.details.level.name: Level
system.details.level.description: This changes only the appearance on the character sheet and letting you increase level beyond 20. All other level-based properties (such as proficiency) are already derived.

system.attack.flat.name: Attack Flat To-Hit
system.attack.flat.description: True or false. Note: Should use "activities[attack].attack.flat" instead.

system.damage.parts.name: Damage Parts
system.damage.parts.description: Allows you to add damage parts in the legacy format (e.g. [["1d6", "fire"]]). Will add parts to all damage-dealing activities, not only attacks.

activities[check].check.dc.formula.name: DC Formula
activities[check].check.dc.formula.description: "activities[check].check.dc.calculation" should be set to "Custom Formula" if using this key.

activities[heal].healing.scaling.number.name: Healing: Scaling Number
activities[heal].healing.scaling.number.description: Additional dice rolled per scaling level.

activities[heal].healing.scaling.formula.name: Healing: Scaling Formula
activities[heal].healing.scaling.formula.description: Additional formula added per scaling level.

activities[save].save.dc.formula.name: DC Formula
activities[save].save.dc.formula.description: "activities[save].save.dc.calculation" should be set to "Custom Formula" if using this key.

activities[summon].match.ability.name: Ability to Match
activities[summon].match.ability.description: Summoner ability score to use for matching attacks/saves.

activities[transform].settings.effects.name: Transform: Effects
activities[transform].settings.effects.description: Which types of effects to keep when transforming.

activities[transform].settings.keep.name: Transform: Keep
activities[transform].settings.keep.description: Which details to keep when transforming.

activities[transform].settings.merge.name: Transform: Merge
activities[transform].settings.merge.description: Which proficiencies to merge when transforming.

activation.value.name: Activation Value
activation.value.description: Quantity of activation type required (if applicable)

activation.override.name: Activation Override
activation.override.description: Not relevant in an enchantment context.

duration.override.name: Duration Override
duration.override.description: Not relevant in an enchantment context.

effects.name: Effects
effects.description: An array of objects with "_id" equal to the id of an effect on the item which should be applied when the activity is used.

range.override.name: Range Override
range.override.description: Not relevant in an enchantment context.

target.override.name: Target Override
target.override.description: Not relevant in an enchantment context.

uses.recovery.name: Uses Recovery
uses.recovery.description: An array of objects representing recovery.
